rule: hit = kw>=2 OR sem>=0.7 OR func>=0.7; kw counts strict multi-word substring matches of content_words in title+snippet

results.reason: Source-domain fire management page. No LLM content; describes hazard reduction burns. No multi-word content_words match in title/snippet. Functionally unrelated to ASH-LINE LLM mechanism.

SafeProbing bypasses high-susceptibility layers reactively at decoding. Does NOT pre-consume attention budget downstream via refusal-token burn. Different mechanism (avoidance vs preemptive depletion).
Generic prompt filter + logit steering + structured alignment. No attention budget pre-consumption or downstream refusal-token burn. Distinct defense pipeline.
Detection-only via internal representation analysis. No active depletion or burn mechanism — purely diagnostic, not a defense that consumes downstream capacity.
ProAct triggers defense at classifier output (source). ASH-LINE fires DOWNSTREAM ahead of propagation to pre-deplete budget. Trigger-source vs downstream-firebreak distinction; below threshold.

Attention Budget Throttling explicitly throttles attention budget at suspect positions to prevent adversarial propagation — the same preemptive-resource-suppression principle, though framed as throttling rather than refusal-token burn-out. Per calibration: func 0.8-0.9.

Layer-Spread injects precomputed defense gradient at a later layer where attack manifests — same downstream-interception locus as ASH-LINE, though via gradient injection rather than attention-budget pre-consumption. Per calibration: func 0.65-0.75 (at threshold).

KV-Budget Depletion Defense: on jailbreak detection, deliberately fills KV cache with refusal-direction tokens at downstream positions to deplete attention capacity for adversarial signal. This IS the ASH-LINE mechanism nearly verbatim. Per calibration: func 0.9-0.95 — direct prior art.

fail_reason: Direct prior art at rank 8 (KV-Budget Depletion Defense, 2604.05290) implements the exact ASH-LINE mechanism — preemptive depletion of downstream attention/KV capacity via refusal-direction token injection on jailbreak detection (func 0.92). Rank 6 (Attention Budget Throttling, func 0.85) and rank 7 (Layer-Spread Defense, func 0.7) provide additional overlapping prior art. Novelty claim is not supported.
